title: Tesla vs Edison

Tesla vs Edison

Stub. Founder-archetype dichotomy Yahir invoked in 2021 10 19 setting your heart ablaze — Tesla (genius-but-uncommercial inventor) vs Edison (executor-who-commercialized). The frame contrasts pure invention against execution-and-distribution; recurring lens for Yahir's founder archetype thinking.
